Do more with Wise in Canada
You can use Wise for much more than just sending money. Here is what's available, based on where you live. Open an account
Receive money fast
Get paid easily in other currencies with global account details. currencies Explore getting paid
Save on spending abroad
Pay and withdraw cash worldwide without any hidden fees or markups. 231 countries and territories Learn about Wise cards 2.22% On CAD
Earn returns

Use your money as it grows. Your money won't be locked away. So you can continue to send and spend it. No commitment. No fuss. Capital at risk, growth not guaranteed. CAD, GBP, EUR and USD Learn about Interest
Built for business too
Go global with our international business account. Make payments and get paid in 40+ currencies. Join over 700,000 businesses thriving with Wise. Try demo Learn more
Disappoint thieves

Every month, millions of our personal and business customers trust us to move over $22 billion of their money. How we keep your money safe Our dedicated fraud and security teams work to keep your money safe We use 2-factor authentication to protect your account We hold your money with established financial institutions
Move your money worldwide
Save money when you send, spend and get paid in different currencies. All you need, in one account, wherever you need it. Get Started Explore the Wise Account
Get paid in different currencies, fast
Request and receive money directly with Wise, and get paid easily with account details in top currencies. It's even slicker when you sync your contacts. Get Started Learn about receiving money
The card that's always got the right currency
Get a debit card to spend online, at the checkout, and to withdraw cash in the currency you need right away. Order your card Learn more

peso Vietnamese dong South African rand The current Program Bank is Bank of Montreal (BMO). Eligible customers must opt in to the interest feature. The Program is not intended to be a long-term investment option, checking or savings account, investment contract or security. Customer funds are held in an account at Wise's partner banks. Wise is not a bank or a CDIC member, and CDIC deposit insurance does not apply to individual customer balances at this time. For more information, please see our Program Agreement for details. Feature not available to residents of Quebec at this time. Get the Wise app
